jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Tanishq
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Tanishq in Ranchi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tanishq:
Tanishq is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tanishq!
